edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:1bdd30cbf324
edges.original_sentence: If we use Parry Sound as a benchmark for successful restoration of trout, the low use of spawning reefs in northern Lake Michigan indicates that the density of spawning lake trout is too low to support natural recruitment
